creator: sahil@tandon.net
text:
If the port is built WITH_VDA defined, then the distinfo needs to
contain references to the VDA patch files.  This is, of course, if the
VDA patch compiles properly with 2.5.9.  If not, then the port needs to
be set to IGNORE= in case WITH_VDA is defined.

I'm happy to test the VDA patch with 2.5.9 as well as 2.3.19
(ports/139399) if you are unable to do it, but it will take me a few
days.  Thanks for your efforts!

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@tandon.net>
